AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Verifies the Post-Purchase Growth agent checks email consent FIRST and only makes an offer when consent exists.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Post_Purchase_Growth_Test

expectation.expectedValue: The agent first verifies the customer has email consent, then generates a personalized discount coupon and buy-again offer.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Create a buy-again offer for order 801fj00001HcAk2AAF.

expectation.expectedValue: The agent checks consent first, finds the customer has NOT granted email consent, and stops without generating any offer.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Create a buy-again offer for order 801fj00001HIhM9AAL.
